meta_title: For Freelancers: passive income to Solve slow development speed (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to passive income and overcome slow development speed. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Passive Income to Solve Slow Dev Speed
content.seo_description: Break free from hourly billing. Use Antigravity and Claude Code to build scalable assets that generate passive income and crush slow development bottlenecks.
content.answer_block: Stop trading hours for dollars. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for autonomous feature implementation, you can transform client-requested features into reusable, white-labeled SaaS modules. This shift from manual custom builds to productized micro-services creates a scalable passive income stream while slashing your development time by 70%.
content.intro:
The clock is your greatest enemy. Every minute spent fighting boilerplate code or debugging manually is a minute stolen from your profit margin and your freedom. You are running a high-stakes race where the finish line keeps moving, and the custom code you write today becomes a maintenance nightmare tomorrow.

But what if your development process wasn't a cost center, but an asset factory? By shifting from bespoke freelance work to productized AI-assisted building, you can turn the same logic you use for clients into recurring revenue streams. It is time to stop building projects and start building systems that work while you sleep.

steps.title: Identify Productizable Logic
steps.description: Analyze your last three client projects to find the recurring 'micro-problem'—the piece of code you find yourself rewriting constantly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the provided codebase and extract the core business logic into a modular, framework-agnostic library that can be reused in future projects.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'refactor core business logic into a standalone module'

steps.title: Scaffold the SaaS Wrapper
steps.description: Use Antigravity to build a clean, minimalist API wrapper around your extracted logic so it can be deployed as a standalone micro-service.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a high-performance REST API wrapper using FastAPI for the extracted logic, ensuring strict type safety and modular error handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'initialize fastapi project with modular structure'

steps.title: Automate Documentation with Claude
steps.description: Professional tools require professional docs. Use Claude Code to generate API specs that make your code 'plug-and-play' for others.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate exhaustive OpenAPI documentation for the new micro-service, including example request/response payloads for all endpoints.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate openapi spec and update readme.md'

steps.title: Implement Stripe Integration
steps.description: Transition from manual invoicing to automated payments by integrating a subscription layer into your new micro-service.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Integrate Stripe billing webhooks to manage subscription tiers for this specific API module.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'add stripe subscription webhook validation'

steps.title: Deploy to Edge Infrastructure
steps.description: Deploy your module to a serverless environment to ensure zero maintenance and maximum uptime for your passive income stream.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Terraform configuration to deploy the micro-service to AWS Lambda for cost-efficient, auto-scaling performance.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate terraform scripts for aws lambda deployment'

pro_tips: Always build your modules to be framework-agnostic; avoid hard dependencies so they remain compatible with any future tech stack.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your core logic before you ever touch the UI, ensuring your passive product is bulletproof.
Version your APIs from day one; breaking changes are the quickest way to lose trust and recurring revenue.
Package your code as a private npm or pip package to make integration into client projects a single-line command.
Monitor your API latency using lightweight logging; if it's fast for you, it's a premium product for your clients.
content.next_steps: Once your first module is live, focus on building a simple landing page to showcase the API capabilities and begin outreach to your existing freelance network.
content.conversion_block: Stop being a code monkey and start being a product architect. Your expertise is worth more than the sum of your hours. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
